<{%fg 2%}>+ codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack::test]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ codeinfra:providers:pkgA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::codeinfra:providers:pkgA::default]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:m:typA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::pkgA:m:typA::newResource]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 2%}>+ component: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>    [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::component::parent]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}>    <{%fg 2%}>+ pkgA:m:typA: (create)
<{%fg 2%}>        [urn=urn:codeinfra:test::test::component$pkgA:m:typA::child]
<{%reset%}><{%reset%}><{%fg 13%}><{%bold%}>Resources:<{%reset%}>
    <{%fg 2%}>+ 4 created<{%reset%}>
